title: Merch Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection
display_title: Merch Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 12, 2019 2:25 pm Another book getting a U.S. release, similar to this Rebuild book to be released by VIZ , but I can't find any Japanese equivalent, unless it's a simultaneous release? Which would be pretty cool. This one'll be released by Udon Entertainment. Neat stuff! http://www.udonentertainment.com/blog/u ... -available https://www.amazon.com/dp/1772940429 tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Everyone's definitely excited for the Netflix release, huh?

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Feb 12, 2019 6:00 pm This seems to be the same as the 2015 edition I already have (which cost ¥3000), apart from the hard cover and the English title on the front.

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Feb 12, 2019 7:58 pm I own it too, great book. Tons of Anno sketches. I gotta say, I prefer softcover for this one.

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by Zeruss » Wed Feb 13, 2019 12:51 am For anyone interested, it has been confirmed all the annotations included with the artwork have indeed been translated for this version! tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 13, 2019 1:25 am So I will have to get it...at some point. ^_^

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Feb 13, 2019 12:01 pm Definitely going to add this to my (already) fairly extensive collection of Eva books.

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Feb 17, 2019 12:14 am Now I wish Literary Eagle would still make their book reviews...

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by fnikhall » Wed Sep 04, 2019 11:47 pm Does this book contain a bunch of previously unseen work? Or is it more a collection of other stuff that's been released over time in various places? I'm very interested in getting it, just not sure how worth it it is if a lot of it is already out there...

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Thu Sep 26, 2019 10:29 pm fnikhall wrote: Does this book contain a bunch of previously unseen work? Or is it more a collection of other stuff that's been released over time in various places? I'm very interested in getting it, just not sure how worth it it is if a lot of it is already out there...

[]: Re: [Merch] Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Collection             Quote Post by fnikhall » Mon Oct 14, 2019 1:00 pm Literary Eagle wrote: This book is a collection of black-and-white pre-production sketches. Many of them have previously appeared in the books Shin Seiki Evangelion Settei Shiryoushuu , Shin Seiki Evangelion Settei Shiryoushuu For “Eva” Maniacs , and Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100% Collection . So if you already have those books, you'll have seen many of these pictures before (this new book has the images in a larger size than the Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100% Collection , though). But if you don't already have those books, and you're interested in pre-production sketches, then this is a really nice book to get. The English version is good quality too, except for the misleading title... this book contains pre-production art, not production art! If you would like further details, I reviewed the Japanese version of the book a few years ago, plus I recently edited the review to add some information about the English version. Here's a link to the review: https://literaryeagle.tumblr.com/post/126400433009/for-my-thirty-fourth-evangelion-book-review-here I hope that helps.
